历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 1905 → 2636 → 2533 → 2845 → 2715, showing an overall backward trend, fluctuating within the 2500–2850 range in recent three years; the baseline for 2025 is about 2715. The enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing Physics Category: 74 in 2021, 76 in 2022, 81 in 2023, 81 in 2024, 81 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 86, an increase of about 6.2% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked 12th/12th/11th/11th/12th/13th in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, consistently in the national Top 15, with a very high level and strong appeal to candidates. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct and school management responses, which may have a slight inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm. Douyin heat total ranking 29th (relatively hot), short video exposure moderately high. There were records of enrollment gaps from 2022 to 2024, but the reputation has turned slightly positive in 2025, with limited overall impact. The fifth round of discipline evaluation has 23 disciplines rated A- or above, including Ecology A+, Business Administration A+, Clinical Medicine A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Mathematics A, Physics A, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, which has a strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering are highly popular and recommended. The total number of candidates for the Chongqing 2026 general college entrance examination is about 209,000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 136,895 based on recent proportions, a slight decrease of about 1.7% compared to 139,478 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, not a local university in Chongqing, but as a top 985 university in South China, it has strong cross-provincial appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend of rankings, the enrollment expansion of about 6.2% in 2026 (which increases the ranking number), a slight decrease in total candidates (slightly easing competition), a slightly negative reputation (slight inhibition), and the very high university level (continuous attraction), based on the 2025 baseline of 2715, the factors are basically balanced, requiring no additional correction; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2816, with a range of 2495–3137.
